question: What are the top stop locations for the West Region fleet in the last 30 days?
reasoning: SF Embarcadero is the West Region's primary dispatch point at 174 visits, but its 22 min avg dwell reflects rapid load-and-go operations. SFO Cargo Terminal carries the longest dwell at 58 min due to cargo check-in procedures — Nakamura (w1) and Oliveira (w2) account for 74% of visits here. Mission District's 19 min avg dwell is the fastest stop in the region. Daly City Hub at 79 visits serves as the southernmost anchor; Schreiber (w3) routes almost exclusively through this corridor.
